an5.37:1.1: “In giving a meal, the donor gives five things to the recipient.
an5.37:1.3: He/she gives life, beauty, happiness, strength, & quick-wittedness.
an5.37:1.4: Having given life, he/she has a share in long life, either human or divine.
an5.37:1.5: Having given beauty, he/she has a share in beauty, either human or divine.
an5.37:1.6: Having given happiness, he/she has a share in happiness, either human or divine.
an5.37:1.7: Having given strength, he/she has a share in strength, either human or divine.
an5.37:1.8: Having given quick-wittedness, he/she has a share in quick-wittedness, either human or divine.
an5.37:1.9: In giving a meal, the donor gives these five things to the recipient.”
an5.37:2.1: The enlightened person giving life, strength,
an5.37:2.3: the intelligent person, a giver of happiness—
